title: phacelia inundata
intro: Phacelia inundata, also known as the bluegum phacelia, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Phacelia inundata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the severity of colds and flu, and even aid in wound healing. Phacelia inundata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
